name: pipelinekit
description: A local AI production pipeline for Blender.

scripts.prebuild:desktop: corepack pnpm --filter @pipelinekit/core --filter @pipelinekit/recipes --filter @pipelinekit/assets -r build && corepack pnpm --filter @pipelinekit/sidecar run bundle && corepack pnpm --filter @pipelinekit/desktop exec vite build
